name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the plugin in Homebridge.

refresh.title: Refresh Interval
refresh.description: How often to poll the API for updates (in seconds).

duration.title: Override Duration
duration.description: Default duration for temporary temperature overrides (in minutes).

primarySensor.title: Primary Thermostat Sensor
primarySensor.description: Which sensor should be displayed as the main temperature for the Thermostat accessory.

showAirTemp.title: Show Air Temperature Sensor
showAirTemp.description: Expose the internal air temperature sensor as a separate accessory.

showFloor1Temp.title: Show Floor 1 Temperature Sensor
showFloor1Temp.description: Expose the primary wired floor temperature probe as a separate accessory.

showFloor2Temp.title: Show Floor 2 Temperature Sensor
showFloor2Temp.description: Expose the secondary wired floor temperature probe as a separate accessory.

enableEveThermoLogging.title: Enable Eve Temperature History
enableEveThermoLogging.description: Logs historical temperature and heating data for viewing in the Eve app.

enableEveEnergyLogging.title: Enable Eve Energy History
enableEveEnergyLogging.description: Logs historical power consumption for viewing in the Eve app.
